description: Operational dashboard for governance classifier output and review exceptions.

options.content:
### Governance Classifier and Exception Operations
Monitor classifier output, rule-version adoption and approved automation overrides.  
**Governance signal rate** is the percentage of normalized audit events promoted into the curated governance table; it is not intended to be 100% because the classifier deliberately selects governance-relevant events.

panels.title: Normalized Audit Events
panels.description: All normalized source audit events in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_audit_events_normalized`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

panels.title: Classified Governance Events
panels.description: Events promoted into the curated governance table.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${rule_id:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR rule_id = '${rule_id:raw}'
)

panels.title: Governance Signal Rate
panels.description: Curated governance events divided by normalized audit events.

targets.rawSql:
WITH raw_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_audit_events_normalized`
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
),
governance_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${rule_id:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR rule_id = '${rule_id:raw}'
)
)
SELECT SAFE_DIVIDE(governance_count.total, raw_count.total) AS value
FROM raw_count, governance_count

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions`
WHERE is_active = TRUE

panels.title: Exception-Matched Events
panels.description: Governance events matched by an active review exception.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)

panels.title: Exception Priority Mismatches
panels.description: Matched events whose final priority differs from the configured override.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
  AND UPPER(governance_event.review_priority) != UPPER(exception.priority_override)

panels.title: Governance Signal Rate Over Time
panels.description: Daily normalized event volume versus classified governance volume.

targets.rawSql:
WITH raw_daily AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time, COUNT(*) AS raw_events
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_audit_events_normalized`
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  GROUP BY time
),
governance_daily AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time, COUNT(*) AS governance_events
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${rule_id:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR rule_id = '${rule_id:raw}'
)
  GROUP BY time
)
SELECT
  raw_daily.time,
  raw_daily.raw_events,
  COALESCE(governance_daily.governance_events, 0) AS governance_events
FROM raw_daily
LEFT JOIN governance_daily USING (time)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Classifier Output by Rule
panels.description: Rules producing the largest share of curated events.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT rule_id, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${rule_id:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR rule_id = '${rule_id:raw}'
)
GROUP BY rule_id
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Output by Rule Version
panels.description: Classifier output split by rule and rule version.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CONCAT(rule_id, ' / ', rule_version) AS rule_version_name,
COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${rule_id:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR rule_id = '${rule_id:raw}'
)
GROUP BY rule_version_name
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Active Exception Register
panels.description: Current approved automation and priority-override configuration.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  exception_id,
  actor,
  action,
  governance_event_type,
  priority_override,
  reason,
  owner_team,
  is_active
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions`
WHERE is_active = TRUE
ORDER BY owner_team, actor, action
LIMIT 500

SELECT governance_event.actor, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
GROUP BY governance_event.actor
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT governance_event.action, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
GROUP BY governance_event.action
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT governance_event.review_priority, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
GROUP BY governance_event.review_priority
ORDER BY events DESC

panels.title: Exception Priority Mismatches
panels.description: These rows indicate an exception-match or classifier-application problem.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  governance_event.event_time,
  governance_event.actor,
  governance_event.action,
  governance_event.governance_event_type,
  governance_event.review_priority,
  exception.priority_override,
  exception.exception_id,
  exception.reason,
  exception.owner_team,
  governance_event.repository,
  governance_event.rule_id,
  governance_event.rule_version
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
  AND UPPER(governance_event.review_priority) != UPPER(exception.priority_override)
ORDER BY governance_event.event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

panels.title: Approved Automation Event History
panels.description: Complete event history matched by approved automation exceptions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  governance_event.event_time,
  governance_event.actor,
  governance_event.action,
  governance_event.governance_event_type,
  governance_event.review_priority,
  exception.priority_override,
  exception.exception_id,
  governance_event.org,
  governance_event.repository,
  governance_event.review_reason,
  governance_event.rule_id,
  governance_event.rule_version
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
ORDER BY governance_event.event_time DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Recent Classifier Output
panels.description: Recent curated output with rule attribution.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_area,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor,
  affected_identity,
  org,
  repository,
  rule_id,
  rule_version,
  review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${rule_id:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR rule_id = '${rule_id:raw}'
)
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 500

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization

query.query:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000
query.rawSql:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

list.definition:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization

    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

list.name: repository
list.label: Repository

query.query:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000
query.rawSql:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000

list.definition:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor

query.query:
SELECT actor_name AS __text, actor_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
    AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000
query.rawSql:
SELECT actor_name AS __text, actor_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
    AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000

list.definition:
SELECT actor_name AS __text, actor_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
    AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000
